message:
test: add OCI registry support with tarball extraction

Add minimal OCI registry support for ghcr.io features using oras CLI.
Implementation extracts downloaded tarballs and caches features locally.

MINIMAL implementation:
- Detect ghcr.io/mcr.microsoft.com prefixes as OCI refs
- Use oras to download OCI artifacts
- Extract .tgz/.tar.gz tarballs to cache
- Verify caching works (second resolve uses cache)
- Skip complex version handling, auth, HTTPS tarballs

Test coverage:
- TestResolveOCIFeature verifies real ghcr.io feature download
- Tests caching behavior on repeated resolves
- Skips if Docker not available

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
